title: Sphaerostephanos austerus

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.

This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species within the family. Specifically, Sphaerostephanos austerus is classified as a member of the genus Sphaerostephanos, which comprises ferns that are generally found in tropical and subtropical regions.
